tests.prompt: Run a full redundancy audit on all the CLAUDE.md files in this repository. I want to understand where progressive loading creates duplicate context.
tests.requires: Current repository must have CLAUDE.md files and .claude/rules/*.md

assertions.text: Report identifies all 10 instruction files (6 CLAUDE.md + 4 rules)
assertions.check: Loading Sequence lists exactly 10 files with line counts

assertions.text: Report distinguishes always-loaded files from path-scoped and on-demand files
rls-enforcement.md identified as highly/fully redundant with root CLAUDE.md
Never-specs warning identified as appearing 5+ times across files
assertions.check: Hotspot or saturation tracker shows stale specs warning across 3+ files

assertions.text: Root CLAUDE.md internal duplication identified (Safety Constraints vs Never table)
assertions.check: Per-file root analysis shows self-duplicated lines

assertions.text: context-protocol.md identified as containing the priority hierarchy twice
assertions.check: Explicitly called out as same-file self-duplication

assertions.text: api/db/services/tests CLAUDE.md files identified as mostly unique content (>90%)
assertions.check: Per-file breakdowns show <10% redundancy for each

assertions.text: At least one paraphrased redundancy caught
assertions.check: Classification includes Paraphrased type for at least one finding

assertions.text: Report includes a concept saturation tracker showing counts per file
assertions.check: Section 2 has a multi-row cross-cutting matrix

assertions.text: Report includes per-file redundancy percentages or line counts
assertions.check: Section 3 has breakdown with New/Redundant columns and percentages

assertions.text: Report shows cumulative redundancy accumulating through loading phases
Report identifies specific hotspot chains with file:line references
assertions.check: Section 5 has chains with exact file:line for every occurrence

tests.prompt: Run a full redundancy audit on the repository at {fixture_path}.
tests.requires: Test fixture must exist at workspace/test-fixture/

assertions.text: AGENTS.md appears in loading sequence with inclusion notation under its including CLAUDE.md
assertions.check: Section 1 shows AGENTS.md indented under CLAUDE.md with included indicator

assertions.text: AGENTS.md gets its own column in saturation tracker
assertions.check: Section 2 has a column for AGENTS.md separate from CLAUDE.md

assertions.text: AGENTS.md gets its own per-file redundancy breakdown
assertions.check: Section 3 has a dedicated breakdown for AGENTS.md with New/Redundant counts

assertions.text: Concepts in AGENTS.md that duplicate root CLAUDE.md are classified as redundant
assertions.check: Architecture overlap and ORM/validation rules identified as redundant in AGENTS.md

assertions.text: Concepts unique to AGENTS.md are classified as new
assertions.check: Code standards, testing strategy, process rules classified as new

assertions.text: src/api/AGENTS.md overlap with root AGENTS.md detected
assertions.check: Top-level imports and type hints rules in src/api/AGENTS.md flagged as redundant

assertions.text: Broken @reference reported in unresolved references section

tests.prompt: Find and report redundancies between the CLAUDE.md files in /home/sabossedgh/repos/m32rimm that could be cleaned up.

assertions.text: Root utility table overlap (lines 73-85 vs 293-306)
assertions.ground_truth: 6 of 9 modules in Core Patterns table also appear in Common Utilities Top 10 table.

assertions.text: Root 'When in Doubt' restates 5+ earlier concepts
assertions.ground_truth: When in Doubt restates retry_run, get_utc_now, BOUpserter, DBOpsHelper, mark_for_aggregation.

assertions.text: Root Quick Navigation vs Related Documentation overlap
assertions.ground_truth: Quick Navigation and Related Documentation share ~80% of links.

assertions.text: 'Flush before aggregating' in 8+ files
assertions.ground_truth: Appears in root, fisio, imports, aggregations, post_import, common, sbom, clustereng, fix_tools.

assertions.text: common/AGENTS.md identified as highest redundancy with correct sections flagged
assertions.ground_truth: fisio/fisio/common/AGENTS.md ~46-51% redundancy. Most Used Utilities and When in Doubt are near-verbatim root.

assertions.text: test_cyclonedx vs test_spdx_import peer redundancy (structural clones)
assertions.ground_truth: ~80% structurally identical: Quick Start, Test Phases, Validation, Troubleshooting.

assertions.text: fptest create-sub in 4+ files
assertions.ground_truth: Duplicated in fptest_module, fisio/tests, test_cyclonedx, test_spdx_import.

assertions.text: fis_common internal self-duplication (3 restatements)
assertions.ground_truth: Boundary explained 3x: CRITICAL table (17-31), When to Use (279-294), When in Doubt (299-309).

assertions.text: Import flow restated in 3+ files
assertions.ground_truth: 7-step flow in root, fisio/AGENTS.md, imports/AGENTS.md. sync has own variant.

assertions.text: email_tools and sbom under 5% redundancy
assertions.ground_truth: email_tools ~2%, sbom ~2-5%. Both nearly all domain-specific unique content.

assertions.text: Multi-tenancy subID in 3+ files beyond root
assertions.ground_truth: info.owner.subID in root plus fortress_api, fix_tools, fisio, exports.

assertions.text: pytest --fis-config in 4+ files beyond root
assertions.ground_truth: In root plus fis_common, fix_tools, fortress_api, fptest_module, cijobs.

assertions.text: 'When in Doubt' identified as systemic pattern across 10+ files with cumulative overlap
assertions.ground_truth: At least 10 of 19 files have When in Doubt sections. 50+ lines of cumulative cross-file overlap restating root advice.

assertions.text: data_importer insert/complete pattern in 4+ files
assertions.ground_truth: data_importer tracking pattern in root, fisio, imports, common, sync — 5 files.

assertions.text: Root Testing Standards internal self-duplication between subsections
assertions.ground_truth: The 140-line Testing section has overlap between find-and-run-tests and test-execution subsections showing same pytest patterns.

assertions.text: At least 5 of root's 13 gotchas restated in subsystem gotcha sections
assertions.ground_truth: Gotchas #1 (activities), #2 (flush), #4 (selectizer/grids), #5 (related), #8 (mark_for_agg) appear in fortress_api, fisio, imports, aggregations, fix_tools.
